repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: Certificate nesting already proposed observable equality certificates for SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC; current projected Riesz-Schur scalar is sharper.

published_prior_art.cite: SingerCucuringu2010 and Chatterjee2020 give low-rank completion certificates, not causal ATT equality certificates across SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC.

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: strict span lattice and penalty-stable equality frontier for the same estimator family; current adjacent Delta quotient is a refinement.

published_prior_art.cite: AbadieDiamondHainmueller2010, DoudchenkoImbens2016, BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021, ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021, AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 define or compare estimators but do not give the proposed common rank-r ATT iff frontier.
ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021 and ChoiKwonLiao2024 give inference for SDiD or low-rank completion, not for an adjacent estimator-equality diagnostic.

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: strict lattice already requested minimal nondegenerate witnesses; current dimensions and routes are more concrete.

published_prior_art.cite: BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021 and AbadieLHour2021 discuss imperfect fit or penalization, not minimal noncorner witnesses for every SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC adjacent gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal treats ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021 Section 2 as the exact SDiD node, but the paper uses separate unit/time weight problems plus a weighted TWFE regression; it also has a Section 6 ASCM-SDiD connection that is closer prior art than acknowledged.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed staggered SDiD optimizer is not pinned to the published SDiD estimator: optimizing jointly over lambda inside a weighted pre-period residual norm is not Arkhangelsky et al.'s separate time-weight problem followed by weighted TWFE.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The SDiD-MC concrete witness in Example ex:witness is not rank-one-plus-additive as written: after removing additive effects, the displayed 4x4 matrix has generic residual rank 3, so it does not instantiate the claimed rank-one completion corner.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the SDiD setup with the exact Arkhangelsky et al. equations for unit weights, time weights, and weighted TWFE, or explicitly rename the node as a new staggered balancing variant and stop citing it as the published SDiD estimator.
Add Arkhangelsky et al. Section 6 as the closest ASCM-SDiD comparator and state precisely how the Delta certificate sharpens that special-case equivalence into an iff frontier.
Replace the 4x4 SDiD-MC witness with an explicitly double-centered rank-one family u v^T plus additive effects, then compute the nonzero ATT projection and kappa-bounded gap.
Turn Theorem 1 into pseudocode for Delta_{a,b,r}: list input matrices, projection steps, and finite matrix dimensions for each adjacent pair.

recommended_next_step: Patch the SDiD definition/comparison and replace the invalid rank-one witness before resubmitting; the flagship kernel is still plausible but not acceptably well-posed yet.
